games.title: Neon Drift
games.description: Race through neon-lit highways at breakneck speed. Dodge traffic, collect power-ups, and climb the global leaderboard in this ultra-fast arcade racer.

games.title: Void Breaker
games.description: A dark roguelike set in a collapsing universe. Survive infinite waves of cosmic horrors using devastating abilities and strategic upgrades.

games.title: Pixel Fortress
games.description: Build, defend, and conquer in this epic tower defense game. Craft your ultimate fortress and hold off relentless waves of pixel-art enemies.

games.title: StarForge
games.description: Explore a procedurally generated galaxy, mine exotic resources, and build interstellar civilizations in this epic space sandbox.

games.title: Shadow Realm
games.description: A cinematic action-adventure with hand-painted visuals. Unravel the mysteries of a world torn between light and shadow.

games.title: Quantum Chess
games.description: Chess evolved with quantum mechanics. Pieces exist in superposition, entangle with opponents, and collapse into reality — strategy redefined.
